title: PhaseState
description: Per-feature SDLC pipeline state file — persisted on the velocity-state branch

work_id.description: Unique work item identifier (kebab-case). Used as filename: <work-id>.yaml

work_type.description: Work type — determines which pipeline variant is used

pipeline_variant.description: Pipeline variant id selected by the smart-router

started_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the pipeline was initiated

current_phase.description: Phase id of the currently active phase

blocking.description: Work ids that must reach status=approved before this pipeline can advance past its current phase

phases.description: Per-phase state keyed by phase id

metadata.description: Optional freeform metadata (e.g., related issue, PR number)

status.description: Current execution status of this phase

started_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when phase execution started

completed_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when phase completed (gate passed or skipped)

artifacts.description: Relative paths to artifacts produced by this phase

skip_reason.description: Justification text — required when status is skipped

revision_request.description: Developer's revision request — written when gate is rejected

assumptions.description: Assumptions recorded by phase-interview when questions were skipped

GateRecord.description: Gate evaluation result — present after gate has been run

automated_checks.description: Results of automated gate checks (feedback-loop, guardrails)
